name: Kyoto Tool Co., Ltd.
summary: Kyoto Tool Co., Ltd. produces and sells work tools for automobile maintenance, other general tools, and relative apparatus in Japan and internationally. It also provides precision molded tools; and high-precision machine tool parts and industrial machine parts. The company's products include tool sets; tool storage products; measuring instruments; building/equipment; general purpose, conventional, insulation, automobile, motorcycle, cycle, medical equipment, plumbing, and power tools; apparel; goods; and garage items and others. It offers its products under the nepros, KTC, TRASAS, Digirache, and FF WORLD brands. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
